description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a gable roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn with a concrete base. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick, and the roof is covered with brown tiles. The front facade features a main entryway with a small overhang and a single door, flanked by two windows on the ground floor and three windows on the upper floor. The rear of the house has a simpler design with fewer windows and a small protruding section, possibly for a utility room or secondary entrance. The house is paired in the scene with a visible steel frame structure, likely representing the building's internal skeleton or an adjacent construction. The overall design is functional and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A two-story brick house with a brown gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a small covered entryway, set on a green lawn with a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the house's gable roof, main entryway, and symmetrical window arrangement, alongside the steel frame structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, window placement, and the depth of the house, with the steel frame structure visible separately.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with fewer windows and a small protruding section, as well as the roof's shape.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the main door, entry overhang, and the arrangement of windows, with the steel frame structure to the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a small overhang, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
